title: Bell 505 Becomes World's First Single Engine Helicopter to Fly Using 100% Sustainable Aviation Fuel
text: FORT WORTH, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Bell Textron Inc., a Textron Inc. (NYSE: TXT) company, announced today the Bell 505 completed its first flight fueled solely by 100% Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF), marking the first-ever single engine helicopter to fly with 100% SAF. Bell collaborated with Safran Helicopter Engines, Neste, GKN Aerospace and Virent Inc. to make this Bell 505 flight possible.

title: Textron Aviation Special Missions Beechcraft King Air 260 chosen as new U.S. Navy Multi-Engine Training System (METS)
text: WICHITA, Kan.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Textron Aviation announced it has been awarded the Multi-Engine Training System (METS) contract by Naval Air Systems Command (NAVAIR).

title: Textron: Likely A Stock To Hold For A Decade
text: Bell, a subsidiary of Textron, won the V280 helicopter contract estimated to be worth $70 to $80 billion. Bell expects lower profits this year. The aviation business sales were $300 hundred million lower than guidance because of supply chain and labor issues. The aviation backlog increased by $3.5 billion.

title: Textron Aviation Adds to Growing List of Options for Cessna SkyCourier With Introduction of New Gravel Kit
text: WICHITA, Kan.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Textron Aviation today announced it is now offering a gravel kit for its new twin-engine, large-utility Cessna SkyCourier turboprop that gives customers the flexibility to operate their aircraft in and out of unimproved runways around the world. First deliveries of the SkyCourier with the installed option will commence later this month.

title: Kautex Wins First Order for Pentatonic Skid Plate for Battery Electric Vehicles
text: BONN, Germany--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Kautex Textron GmbH & Co. KG (Kautex), a Textron Inc. (NYSE: TXT) company, announced it has received the first order from an automotive OEM for a thermoplastic composite underbody battery protection skid plate. The skid plate is part of the company's new Pentatonic battery system product line supporting battery electric vehicle production.
